name: IndexNow key found in meta tag

name: IndexNow key not in meta tag

expected.finding: No <meta name='indexnow'> tag found (optional but improves validation speed).
expected.fix: Add <meta name="indexnow" content="mysecretkey123"> to the <head> section.

expected.finding: No <meta name='indexnow'> tag found (optional but improves validation speed).

name: Key file exists but key doesn't match

expected.finding: Key file exists at https://example.com/mysecretkey123.txt but does not contain the expected key.
expected.fix: Update https://example.com/mysecretkey123.txt to contain only the key value: mysecretkey123

expected.finding: Key file not found at https://example.com/mysecretkey123.txt (HTTP 404).
expected.fix: Create a text file at https://example.com/mysecretkey123.txt containing only: mysecretkey123
